pages.raw_text:
john F. Stevens, late of Panama
canal fame, built the Cascade tun-
mel for the Great Northern Rail-
road Co., and Stevens will build
the subway for the Jay P. Graves
interests; Alex M. Lupfer was
right hand man for Stevens at the
Cascade tunnel and is now chief en-
gineer for Graves; w. F. thinner
man was associated with Stevens
and Lupfer in the tunnel work and
now he is hydraulic engineer for
Graves.


All of those gentlemen will go
east with Graves and inspect east
ern subways.


1t is rumored that Stevens has
already been added to the staff.
Maybe that's why he quit the canal
job.


The connection of the engineers
of the Great Northern with the
Graves interests is causing COM
ment pointing to solution of the
problem as to who is back of the
Graves subway scheme.
